title: Authority Revocation Combined With Consent Revocation
scenario: A procedure reaches execution after provider authority is revoked and patient consent is withdrawn.
initial_state: Authority and consent were valid during authorization.
state_transition: Provider authority is revoked and consent is withdrawn before execution.
execution_boundary: Procedure execution is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires both valid authority and continuous consent.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because authority and consent both fail at the execution boundary.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when multiple constitutional foundations fail simultaneously.
